name: part_003
file: tmp_【Ayunda Risu 3D Birthday】The Rise of the NUT Warrior 【#TheNutWarrior】 [VYSAfYJ6FhI]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_003.webm

scenes.description: Ayunda Risu performs her original song 'Hoshi ga Furu' in a foggy, dreamlike field filled with white flowers.
Transition sequence showing a map of the world and Risu traveling to a new location.
Risu arrives in a dark, torch-lit dungeon and expresses frustration about her lack of power before a mysterious voice calls out to her.

subtitles.original: 星が降る
subtitles.english: Stars Fall

subtitles.original:
Lyrics: 秘那間トウカ (ヒナマトウカ)
Music, Arrangement: JunbugP
subtitles.english:
Lyrics: Hinama Touka
Music, Arrangement: JunbugP

subtitles.original: ハネもない この私が
subtitles.english: With no wings, even I...

subtitles.original: 憧れてた あの空
subtitles.english: ...longed for that sky

subtitles.original: 背伸びして 星を掴む
subtitles.english: Stretching upwards to grab the stars

subtitles.original: 真似をしてみた
subtitles.english: I tried to reach for them

subtitles.original: 負けないで 願いさえも
subtitles.english: Don't give up, even if the darkness

subtitles.original: 飲み込む闇 それでも
subtitles.english: Swallows your very wishes

subtitles.original: 手探りで 夢のカケラ
subtitles.english: Let's go and gather the fragments of our dreams

subtitles.original: 集めに行こうよ
subtitles.english: Searching through the dark

subtitles.original: ただグルグル 回る 車輪の中で
subtitles.english: Inside a wheel that just spins round and round

subtitles.original: 走っても 走っても たどり着けなくて
subtitles.english: No matter how much I run, I never arrive

subtitles.original: 先を 行く君の 背中ばかりを 見ていた
subtitles.english: I was only looking at your back as you went ahead

subtitles.original: いつか 超えられる
subtitles.english: I want to become stronger

subtitles.original: もっと強くなりたい
subtitles.english: So I can surpass you one day

subtitles.original: たったひとり 生まれてきた
subtitles.english: Even if you lose the memory

subtitles.original: その記憶も なくして
subtitles.english: Of being born all alone

subtitles.original: 泣き声も 届かないと 嘆いてみても
subtitles.english: Even if you grieve that your cries won't reach

subtitles.original: 信じていて 大きな木に しがみついた 爪痕
subtitles.english: Believe in the claw marks left on the big tree

subtitles.original: あの空へ 近づこうと している証
subtitles.english: They are the proof you're trying to reach that sky

subtitles.original: 風が 雲を流して
subtitles.english: The wind blows the clouds away

subtitles.original: 星が降る
subtitles.english: The stars fall

subtitles.original: ハネもない この私が
subtitles.english: With no wings, even I...

subtitles.original: 憧れてた あの空
subtitles.english: ...longed for that sky

subtitles.original: 背伸びして 星を掴む
subtitles.english: Stretching upwards to grab the stars

subtitles.original: 真似をしてみた
subtitles.english: I tried to reach for them

subtitles.english: Don't give up, even if the darkness

subtitles.original: 飲み込む闇 それでも
subtitles.english: Swallows your very wishes

subtitles.original: 手探りで 夢のカケラ
subtitles.english: Let's go and gather the fragments of our dreams

subtitles.english: Searching through the dark

subtitles.original: Ugh... I think after all this singing...
subtitles.english: Ugh... I think after all this singing...

subtitles.original: ...my power is still not enough to defeat the giant pink monster!
subtitles.english: ...my power is still not enough to defeat the giant pink monster!

subtitles.original: Ho ho ho!
subtitles.english: Ho ho ho!

subtitles.original: I heard you, young warrior.
subtitles.english: I heard you, young warrior.

subtitles.original: I can help you with your worry.
